title: WandMod
description: Add a new magical adventure to Minecraft
body:
# **More entertainment, waiting for you to adventure**
- ### Need to geckolib support environment

# ScrollMagic

Adds 6 spells to the MC

- [Scroll Magic](#scrollmagic)
- [scroll](#scroll)
- [scrollbelt](#scrollbelt)
- [magic](#magic)
- [MagicOre](#magicore)
- [Altar](#altar)
- [BaseWand](#basewand)

---

## Scroll

Using sticks and paper to form an 'empty scroll'

![scroll stick recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad6d66ede735a196221d222e81eafcd08c8f9258.png)
~~![scroll recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2007a7930e2da240ae80fdd879ea2fed43ae909.png)~~

Drop the 'empty scroll' onto the corresponding block/item to create a magic scroll

![flame scroll crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/daf6887b0fcb9df4e9a8f6ace42978d007acae2d.gif)

| item/cube | Magic Scroll |
| ---------- | -------- |
| Flame | Flame scroll |
| ice cube | freeze reel |
| dripping cone | Dripping scroll |
| Eye of Ender | the Phantom Scroll |
| Retained Poison II | Poison Scroll |
| Life Restoration II | The Healing Scroll |

Put the scroll in the secondary, 'right' expand, 'left' cast magic, each scroll can only be used once

![flame scroll using](https://www.picgo.net/image/flame-scroll-using.oQf6xk)

## ScrollBelt

Wearable scroll backpack

![scroll belt craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/533ef097afd5c5d0ef6c33a2da69484b6a5b104d.png)

When wearing, press 'g' to open the strap and place the scroll inward

![magic belt wearing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e072e4e4ea5bebcb2cc0b095901d9339aaaba0bb.png)

When there is a scroll in the strap, you can directly 'right click' take out the scroll to use

cure

## MagicOre

The mineral that is generated in and can also be found in the center of [altar](# altar), which is excavated to obtain the aggregates powder

![magic ore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36d4962b8513318635a0370d7c49b3edb1f6fd70.png)

## Altar

A structure for summoning magic and aggregates

![altar_structure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5ac835880ca8fd6d65c7dae8aa56edc4f7b74a6.png)

Altars are generated in the following groups:
- The jungle.
- The forest.
- The coniferous forest
- The desert.
- The plain.
- Snow fields.
- Sunflower Plains.
- Savanna.
- Tropical Plateau
- The wind hits the savanna

After placing similar items on 8 altars, use the powder to right-click the Skandome mine to summon

When the item is a scroll, summon a wide range of magic

Summon the aggregates when the item is the Aggregates

![polymer spawn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4a4492026f3bf8f8e45d8f5e516ced7eca8773f.gif)

After defeating the aggregates, obtain the wand core

## BaseWand

None Consume powerful weapons that use any magic

Use the 'R' + 'Scroll wheel' to switch spells, long press the 'right button' and release to cast

![wand using](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c52d06d0b79f55d0e102bcf73e3299733665f7cd.gif)
